name: figure-with-data-table
description: A chart. APG has no pattern for one, so this is Arena's own, adopted from WCAG 1.1.1 rather than invented: a picture nobody can read is not an alternative, so every chart pairs a labelled graphic with a real table of its numbers. The table is visually hidden, not absent. This describes what both chart layers (React and Angular) already do, not an aspiration.

requires.roles.label: aria-label naming the chart
requires.alternative.table: a real <table> of the plotted numbers, visually hidden
